alkylation reagent: alkylated with 11 mM iodoacetamide for 15 min at room temperature in darkness
cleavage agent: trypsin was added at 1:50 trypsin-to-protein mass ratio
collision energy: HCD fragmentation was performed at a normalized collision energy (NCE) of 28%
fractionation method: fractionated into fractions by high pH reverse-phase HPLC
labeling: Each channel of peptide was labeled with its respective TMT reagent
reduction concentration: reduced with 5 mM DTT for 30 min
